commands.review_summary:
The PR lets installed plugins declare agent tool-result middleware runtimes and trusted tool policy ids in manifest/catalog contracts, admits those registrations, orders bundled trusted policies first, and updates plugin SDK docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +228, Docs +21. Total +275 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and `v2026.6.1` still reject non-bundled middleware and trusted-policy registrations, and the PR body includes real CLI install/inspect proof for the intended installed-plugin path. I did not run a live Gateway/VPS scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add trusted-policy snapshot/restore coverage and a regression test; maintainers still need final security approval after that repair.
